input.config_yaml:
# Single source of truth for one training run.
# This file is versioned in git. Every run logs its own git commit hash + a hash
# of this file, so any checkpoint can always be traced back to exactly the config
# and code that produced it (this replaces the notebook's "paste this JSON into
# configs/config_ljs_dap_.json by hand" step).

run:
  name: lupefiasco-radtts-warmstart-v5
  seed: 1234
  # Where inputs/outputs live. In the notebook this was hardcoded Google Drive
  # paths sprinkled through every cell; here it's one block, and can be pointed
  # at local disk, S3, or GCS via the same object-storage client.
  storage:
    backend: s3                       # local | s3 | gcs
    bucket: martinconnor-radtts-training-artifacts
    data_prefix: datasets/lupefiasco/8-formatted-lupe-lines-second-pass-22khz-mono-465
    checkpoint_prefix: checkpoints/lupefiasco-radtts-warmstart-v5
    vocoder_checkpoint: pretrained/hifigan_libritts100360_generator0p5.pt
    vocoder_config: pretrained/hifigan_22khz_config.json
    warmstart_checkpoint: pretrained/radtts++ljs-dap.pt

data:
  training_filelist: training.txt
  validation_filelist: validation.txt
  sampling_rate: 22050
  filter_length: 1024
  hop_length: 256
  win_length: 1024
  n_mel_channels: 80
  mel_fmin: 0.0
  mel_fmax: 8000.0
  f0_min: 80.0
  f0_max: 640.0
  dur_min: 0.1
  dur_max: 10.2
  use_f0: true
  use_energy_avg: true
  symbol_set: radtts
  cleaner_names: [radtts_cleaners]

model:
  n_speakers: 1
  n_speaker_dim: 16
  n_flows: 8
  n_hidden: 1024
  learn_alignments: true
  include_modules: decatndpmvpredapm

train:
  epochs: 1000
  learning_rate: 0.0005
  weight_decay: 1.0e-6
  batch_size: 32
  optim_algo: RAdam
  use_amp: true
  grad_clip_val: 1.0
  iters_per_checkpoint: 200
  unfreeze_modules: all
  loss_weights:
    blank_logprob: -1
    ctc_loss_weight: 0.1
    binarization_loss_weight: 1.0
    dur_loss_weight: 1.0
    f0_loss_weight: 1.0
    energy_loss_weight: 1.0
    vpred_loss_weight: 1.0

# Resume behavior is a config field now, never a sed-patch against train.py
# (the notebook did `sed -i "iteration = checkpoint_dict['iteration']" ...`
# to hand-override the resume point — that mutates vendored source in place
# and is impossible to reproduce or code-review).
resume:
  enabled: false
  from_checkpoint: null      # e.g. "model_1290" — resolved against checkpoint_prefix
  override_iteration: null   # explicit override, replaces the old sed hack

distributed:
  backend: nccl
  # nproc_per_node is passed at launch time via torchrun, not baked in here

tracking:
  wandb:
    enabled: true
    project: radtts-voice-clone
    tags: [lupefiasco, warmstart, dap]
  tensorboard:
    enabled: true
    # local log dir inside the run's own checkpoint prefix, not a Drive folder
    # someone has to remember to point TensorBoard at

retry:
  # Not enforced by anything yet — training/config.py reads and validates
  # these values, but nothing currently retries a failed run on this
  # schedule. That's the natural next step once this is actually running
  # (a supervising script or job queue reads these and relaunches on failure).
  max_restarts: 3
  restart_backoff_seconds: 60
